## How to use

- **Find by task:** `bash ~/.claude/scripts/route.sh "<task>" --top=5`
- **Find by kind:** `bash ~/.claude/scripts/route.sh "<task>" --kind=skill --top=10`
- **Inspect full metadata:** read `~/.claude/registry.json`
- **Invoke a skill:** `Skill({skill: '<name>'})` or `/<command>`
- **Dispatch an agent:** `Task(subagent_type='<agent-name>', ...)`

## Drift prevention

This file is auto-generated. Do not edit by hand — edits will be overwritten next registry rebuild.

`build-registry.sh` invokes this script at the end so the two stay in sync.
